paragraphs: BTC sits at $76,670 flat on the day as the morning $77K bounce slipped through the 17:10Z slice. Breadth holds 18 of 20 majors green at +1.3% median while ETH at $2,103 and SOL at $85.65 each print near +2%. Polymarket priced the Iran peace deal down 7 points to 29.5% YES and Hormuz normalization down 8.6 points to effectively zero — the morning's airspace-resolution optimism partially reverses. The regime read shifts from this morning's risk-on to rotation with HYPE and ZEC carrying the sector bids.

Perps-scan reads QUIET for the second consecutive read with 25 of 25 NEUTRAL. The morning's BSB structural funding gap evaporated entirely — funding cooled from +0.094%/8h at the morning prefetch to +0.0038% now, a 0.09pp reset that erased the DISTRIBUTION setup. HYPE flipped funding to -0.0201%/8h on the +7.76% green day with open interest building 17.86% in 24 hours. Short premium pays into the rising tape — a fresh SHORT-SQUEEZE coil forms underneath the existing multi-week long. ZEC's top-trader long/short ratio at 0.76 sits as the most net-short positioning across the universe into a +7.78% rip, the cleanest squeeze setup loaded if pct_24h clears +10% with open interest reversing.

GENIUS prices in the afternoon perps data at $0.7232, a +9.51% day on $51M volume. Daily close cleared the $0.68 invalidation on the existing short. The fifth distinct GENIUS contract on bsc reactivated the name-farm cluster that the morning brief read as paused — the morning evaluation estimated price at $0.55 from on-chain attention rotation alone and missed the perps print. Correction: close the short on invalidation breach. EDEN's funding extended deeper negative to -0.0496%/8h, the heaviest short premium in the universe by a 2.5x margin over HYPE — the original SHORT thesis flipped to a LONG-side squeeze structure as smart money exited longs into deep negative funding with basis positive at +0.34%.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · QUIET regime holds, RIDE HYPE through fresh squeeze fuel forming below the existing long, CLOSE GENIUS short on invalidation breach. Watchlist tightens — drop BSB and EDEN as structural setups unwound, add RAIL on the privacy promotion with trigger pending pullback.

current_positions.thesis_note: HYPE printed +7.76% on the day to $63.28 with funding flipping to -0.0201%/8h and open interest building 17.86% in 24 hours. Short premium pays into the rising tape — a fresh squeeze coil forms underneath the existing long. AIXBT reframed the thesis from $1B fee-funded buybacks to ATH momentum and Derive options positioning. Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.34, up 0.09 over seven days — smart money still building.
current_positions.watch: The new same-direction squeeze fuel does not pyramid the position. Watch for a daily close above the $63.5 prior ATH with funding holding negative — that confirms the SHORT-SQUEEZE leg on top of the existing long. The downside read flips on a red day with funding cooling back positive, which marks the leverage cycle topping.

current_positions.thesis_note: BCH dropped off both the token-movers winners and losers lists today — the bleed paused but no relief rally arrived. The structural thesis from fire (smart money exit at top-trader L/S -1.43 over 7d, no narrative carrier, 7d -17.04%) holds without contradicting data in today's slice.
current_positions.watch: Without fresh perps data, watching for BCH to surface on tomorrow's token-movers winners list as the early reversal signal. A clean break of $360 confirms the continuation. Upside displacement through $370 invalidates.

current_positions.thesis_note: GENIUS afternoon perps print at $0.7232 cleared the $0.68 invalidation on daily close. The fifth distinct GENIUS contract on bsc reactivated the name-farm cluster after the morning pause, vol_ratio 2.38x cleared the breakout gate, and pct_24h printed +9.51% on $51M volume. The morning brief's $0.55 estimate from on-chain attention rotation missed the perps reading entirely.

Day 1 of the position, fired in this morning's brief. No EIGEN data in the afternoon perps slice and the token doesn't surface on the 17:10Z token-movers winners or losers lists. AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold PEAK 5/5 RIDE in narrative-tracker — the sector tailwind holds.
current_positions.watch: Watch for EIGEN to surface on tomorrow's token-movers winners list as confirmation that the Nebius acquisition bid carries through the week. Close below $0.205 invalidates the structural thesis.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clears 52% with open interest continuing to build, OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $275 OR funding flips negative
thesis: TAO holds NEUTRAL on today's perps scan with open interest building 7.6% over the week on a tight 16% range. Funding at +0.0049%/8h sits above the 7-day average — fresh longs paying premium into the consolidation.

Narrative-tracker keeps AI agents and Decentralized compute both at PEAK with full 5-of-5 RIDE calls. TAO names alongside the institutional compute bid via the a16z fund pivot and the Nvidia Vera positioning thread.

The DIVERGENT pattern sub-tag reads as passive accumulation, possibly arbitrage flow rather than directional demand. The trigger fires when taker buy crosses 52% to confirm aggressive intent in the order book.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to the $640 area that holds with funding turning positive AND top-trader long/short ratio rotating back above 1.00, OR pct_24h clears +10% with open interest reversing negative through the SHORT-SQUEEZE setup
thesis: ZEC printed +7.78% to $679.53 today with funding flipping positive to +0.0068%/8h from a -0.0044% 7-day average. Top-trader long/short ratio at 0.76 sits as the most net-short positioning in the universe, down 0.12 over seven days — the squeeze setup is loaded if the privacy sector keeps the bid.

Narrative-tracker promoted Privacy/ZK to RISING today after five sessions absent. RAIL printed +66% on the same rotation map — sector finding multiple destinations beyond ZEC, which extends the bid but fragments capital across alternatives.

The pullback entry waits for a clean test of $640. The momentum entry waits for ZEC to clear +10% on the day with open interest reversing — that fires the SHORT-SQUEEZE pattern on the existing crowded short positioning.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h prints green +5% with open interest rolling further negative AND short liquidations clear the 7d 75th-percentile of $81K
thesis: GMT sits outside today's 25-asset perps-scan slice — the structural setup from yesterday's afternoon read holds without contradicting data. Funding at -0.204%/8h was the heaviest short premium in the universe by a 14x margin over the second-heaviest negative print.

Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.20 fell 0.68 points over seven days at the watchlist add. Smart money joined the short side alongside the retail crowd — both sides crowded short is asymmetric squeeze structure if any bid arrives.
Spot premium basis +0.34% positive into deeply negative funding. Spot bids the asset while futures shorts hold the line — a funding flush without spot weakness fires the short-cover cascade.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to the $3.50 area that holds with ZEC also holding above $640 OR a second privacy name continuing to print green on the same session
watchlist.invalidation: close below $3.30 before trigger fires (forfeits half of today's breakout candle)
thesis: Today's token-call rated RAIL HIGH 8/10 — top score in the 250-coin scan after the 20-name dedup gate. RAIL printed +66.4% on the day to $4.18 with vol/mcap at 0.04 and 7d at +173.6%, the cleanest single-signal call in today's scan even with the [PUMP-RISK] flag attached.

Privacy/ZK promoted to RISING in narrative-tracker today after a five-session driver drought. Three distinct drivers carry the catalyst — Aleo plus Ledger Private DeFi institutional self-custody push, the US Treasury report recognizing crypto mixers' legitimate financial-privacy use, and the ZEC tape cracking yesterday plus extending today.

Railgun sits inside the privacy-DeFi rail thesis with $92M TVL, $4.7M annual revenue, and $2B+ in shielded volume — real protocol usage backing the rotation. The pullback trigger waits for a clean test of $3.50 because chasing +66% intraday entry is the worst possible timing on a parabolic.

evaluations.note: Day 3/multi-week afternoon re-eval. +3.90% from fire. HYPE printed +7.76% on the day with funding flipping to -0.0201%/8h on OI +17.86% 24h — fresh SHORT-SQUEEZE coil forms underneath the existing long. Top L/S 1.34 +0.09 over 7d — smart money still building. AIXBT reframed thesis from $1B fee-funded buybacks to ATH momentum and Derive options positioning. Same-direction signal does not pyramid; position rides through the new fuel.

Day 2/7 afternoon re-eval. BCH dropped off both token-movers winners and losers lists today — bleed paused but no relief rally. Not in the 25-asset perps-scan slice. Price_at_eval is an estimate near the morning's $353.26 print. Smart-money exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds.

Day 2/3 afternoon re-eval. Afternoon perps print at $0.7232 cleared the $0.68 invalidation on daily close. Fifth distinct GENIUS bsc contract reactivated the name-farm cluster, vol_ratio 2.38x cleared the breakout gate, pct_24h +9.51% on $51M volume. Morning brief's $0.55 estimate from on-chain attention rotation missed the perps print entirely. -24.11% return, -21.52pp vs BTC, -20.53pp vs ETH. LOSS.

Day 1/7. Position fired this morning. No EIGEN data in afternoon perps slice or token-movers winners/losers/trending. Price_at_eval held at fire. AI agents and Decentralized compute both PEAK 5/5 RIDE in narrative-tracker — sector tailwind intact.

close.close_reason: afternoon perps data revealed daily close $0.7232 cleared the $0.68 invalidation; the morning eval's $0.55 estimate from on-chain attention missed the perps print where fifth distinct bsc name-farm contract reactivated the cluster with vol_ratio 2.38x clearing the breakout gate

add_watchlist.trigger: first pullback to the $3.50 area that holds with ZEC also holding above $640 OR a second privacy name continuing to print green on the same session
thesis: Token-call rated RAIL HIGH 8/10 today — top score in the 250-coin scan. +66.4% 24h to $4.18, vol/mcap 0.04, 7d +173.6%.
Privacy/ZK promoted to RISING in narrative-tracker after five sessions absent. Drivers: Aleo + Ledger Private DeFi, US Treasury mixer report, ZEC tape cracking and extending.

Railgun sits inside the privacy-DeFi rail thesis with $92M TVL, $4.7M revenue, $2B+ shielded volume. Real usage. Pullback trigger waits because chasing +66% intraday entry is worst-timing on a parabolic.
named_risks: RAIL up 173.6% over 7 days already — late-cycle entry on a parabolic, the [PUMP-RISK] flag is real.
42.5M tokens still to issue against 57.5M circulating — future emission overhang at 74% of current float.
Narrative arriving after the run-up — capital may rotate to ZEC, Aleo, or other privacy alternatives instead of extending RAIL.
